testcase.name: test_send_unauthenticated

failure.message:
AssertionError: expected 401 got 200 {"session_id":"chat_user_5f2484b996d0_491aaba6e7","reply":"Hi there! I'm **Spark**, your AI study buddy. I'm here to help you tackle your schoolwork, whether it's solving a tricky math equation, debugging some code, or exploring the wonders of science.

Think of me like a digital Swiss Army knife for your brain—I've got tools for almost every subject! 

What are we working on today? Feel free to drop a question or a topic you're curious about!","created_at":"2026-06-02T11:53:17.431172+00:00"}
assert 200 == 401
 +  where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_phase3_chat_payments.py:116: in test_send_unauthenticated assert r.status_code == 401, f"expected 401 got {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: expected 401 got 200 {"session_id":"chat_user_5f2484b996d0_491aaba6e7","reply":"Hi there! I'm **Spark**, your AI study buddy. I'm here to help you tackle your schoolwork, whether it's solving a tricky math equation, debugging some code, or exploring the wonders of science.

Think of me like a digital Swiss Army knife for your brain—I've got tools for almost every subject! 

What are we working on today? Feel free to drop a question or a topic you're curious about!","created_at":"2026-06-02T11:53:17.431172+00:00"} E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
